Lydia Chandler Higgins
(1615 – 1650)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Her father's name is Edmund Chandler; place of burial unknown. 

Wife of Richard Higgins. 

Died c. 1650/51 at age 37. 

Unmarked grave.

(https://www.findagrave.com/memorial/51531906/lydia-higgins) …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lydia Chandler於大約1614年出生在荷蘭霍蘭萊登時，她的父親Edmund Chandler27歲，母親Elizabeth Alden23歲。她於1634年12月11日與Richard Higgins在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1650年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦享年38歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦可福 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lydia Chandler于大约1614年出生在荷兰霍蘭萊登时，她的父亲Edmund Chandler27岁，母亲Elizabeth Alden23岁。她于1634年12月11日与Richard Higgins在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1650年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦享年38岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦可福 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Chandler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a maker and seller of candles, from Anglo-Norman French chandeler ‘maker or seller of candles’ (Old French chandelier, Late Latin candelarius, a derivative of candela ‘candle’). While a medieval chandler no doubt made and sold other articles beside candles, the extended sense of modern English chandler does not occur until the 16th century. The name may also, more rarely, have denoted someone who was responsible for the lighting arrangements in a large house, or else one who owed rent in the form of wax or candles.

variants.name: Candler
meanings: English (East Anglia and southeastern England): variant of   Chandler  .
German: variant of Kandler and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Candler is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Lydia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Greek origin, meaning ‘woman from Lydia’, an area of Asia Minor. The name is borne in the Bible by a woman of Thyatira who was converted by St Paul and who entertained him in her house (Acts 16:14–15, 40). It has enjoyed steady popularity in the English-speaking world since the 17th century.

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.
Oldest Grave seen in the Memorials List
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Lydia Chandler was born about 1614, in Leiden, Holland, Netherlands, her father, Edmund Chandler, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth Alden, was 23. She married Richard Higgins on 11 December 1634, in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died about 1650, in Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 38, and was buried in Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lydia Chandler est née environ 1614, à Leiden, Holland, Pays-Bas, son père, Edmund Chandler, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Alden, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Higgins le 11 décembre 1634, à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1650, à Eastham, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lydia Chandler um 1614 in Leiden, Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Chandler 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Alden 23. Sie hat am 11. Dezember 1634 in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Richard Higgins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1650 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Chandler è nata il circa 1614 nel Leiden, Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Edmund Chandler, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Alden, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Richard Higgins il 11 dicembre 1634, nel Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1650, nel Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lydia Chandlerが約1614年にオランダホーランドレイデンで生まれた時，父Edmund Chandlerは27歳，母Elizabeth Aldenは23歳であった。1634年12月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスでRichard Higginsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1650年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーエアスサムで38歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルエアスサムコブ ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable: 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 이스섬 커브 버이잉 그라운드
ko.Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스
ko.lifeSummary: Lydia Chandler(이)가 대략 1614년 네덜란드 홀랜드 레이든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Chandler(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Alden(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1634년 12월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에서 Richard Higgins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1650년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 이스섬에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 이스섬 커브 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Chandler nasceu aproximadamente 1614, em Leiden, Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Edmund Chandler, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Alden, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Higgins em 11 de dezembro de 1634, em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1650, em Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lydia Chandler родилась около 1614 г. в местности лиден, холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Edmund Chandler было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Alden, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Higgins 11 декабря 1634 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла около 1650 г. в местности эастам, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности ков буринг гроунд, эастам, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lydia Chandler nació aproximadamente 1614, en Leiden, Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Edmund Chandler, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Alden, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Richard Higgins el 11 de diciembre de 1634, en Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1650, en Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
